message:
Command `
echo "=== DRT3 $(date) ==="
ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
[ -n "$ORPID" ] && ps -p $ORPID -o cputime=,%cpu= 2>/dev/null || echo "EXITED"
RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
echo "Step 72 log: $(wc -l < $RUN_DIR/72-openroad-detailedrouting/openroad-detailedrouting.log) lines, $(wc -c < $RUN_DIR/72-openroad-detailedrouting/openroad-detailedrouting.log) bytes"
stat "$RUN_DIR/72-openroad-detailedrouting/openroad-detailedrouting.log" | grep Modify
grep -v "^$" "$RUN_DIR/72-openroad-detailedrouting/openroad-detailedrouting.log" | tail -5
[ -d "$RUN_DIR/final" ] && echo "FINAL!" || echo "no final"
ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/72-openroad-detailedrouting/drt-run-0/" 2>/dev/null | head -3
ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V | grep "^[0-9]" | tail -3
` executed with exit code 0.

function.arguments:
{"command": "

ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
[ -n "$ORPID" ] && ps -p $ORPID -o cputime=,%cpu= 2>/dev/null || echo "EXITED"
RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
echo "Step 72 log: $(wc -l < $RUN_DIR/72-openroad-detailedrouting/openroad-detailedrouting.log) lines, $(wc -c < $RUN_DIR/72-openroad-detailedrouting/openroad-detailedrouting.log) bytes"
stat "$RUN_DIR/72-openroad-detailedrouting/openroad-detailedrouting.log" | grep Modify
grep -v "^$" "$RUN_DIR/72-openroad-detailedrouting/openroad-detailedrouting.log" | tail -5
[ -d "$RUN_DIR/final" ] && echo "FINAL!" || echo "no final"
ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/72-openroad-detailedrouting/drt-run-0/" 2>/dev/null | head -3
ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V | grep "^[0-9]" | tail -3
", "timeout": 15}
function.name: execute_bash
